summary: Project with EN/FR language toggle functionality in the navigation bar.
known_issues: EN/FR language toggle button not appearing in the navigation menu

existing_features.title: Add a clearly visible EN/FR toggle button to the top navigation bar in `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`. The button must appear in both desktop and mobile nav menus. Clicking it should toggle between English (EN) and French (FR) language states. The button should be visually distinct — styled with a clear label showing the current language and a separator (e.g., 'EN | FR') with the active language highlighted — using the existing TMU AI DAO color tokens from `frontend/src/index.css`. Implement a language context or state (e.g., a React context or local state lifted to the Header/Layout level) so the selected language can be consumed by page components. Do NOT change any other UI elements, routes, or backend logic.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add visible EN/FR toggle button in the top navigation bar to switch between English and French
